name: Marissa Torres
text: Working with Briganti was an unreal experience. He made me feel completely at ease and the final photos were straight out of a movie. Can't recommend enough.

name: Jamal Henderson
text: We hired him for our album cover shoot and he absolutely nailed the vibe. Gritty, moody, cinematic — exactly what we wanted. A true artist.

name: Elena Castillo
text: The wedding photos still make me cry. He captured moments I didn't even know happened. Every single frame is a treasure.

name: Derek Ashford
text: His eye for light and shadow is next level. The portrait session felt effortless and the results speak for themselves. Five stars, no question.
